queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of loan duration in months on credit risk drivers and its role in mitigating default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into how the absence of a checking account influences credit risk determinants and contributes to reduced default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical examination of the relationship between critical credit history or existing credits and credit risk drivers, emphasizing their role in lowering default probability.
